modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Running out of space on C: Drive due to OneDrive

full_description_text:  
I’m having a problem with my C: drive, it’s almost full because of OneDrive. I don’t know how to move OneDrive to another location to save space. It’s really frustrating because I need more room for my files, but OneDrive is taking up too much space on my computer. Can someone help me with this?
short_description: Running out of space on C: Drive due to OneDrive
